basic_details.job_title: DUWA Office Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Delhi University Women's Association (DUWA) Office Secretary (Accounts) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of the Delhi University Women's Association (DUWA). A total of 1 Office Secretary (Accounts) vacancy has been announced through the DUWA Office Secretary (Accounts) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.com or B.A with minimum 2 years work experience in computer/accounts/Tally/MS Word/MS Office
qualification.details: Office Secretary (Accounts): B.com/B.A, Minimum 2 yrs. of work experience in computer/ accounts / Tally/ MS. Word /MS. Office. Fluency in English and Letter drafting will be preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DUWA Office Secretary (Accounts) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DUWA Office Secretary (Accounts) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DUWA Office Secretary (Accounts) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DUWA Office Secretary (Accounts) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DUWA Office Secretary (Accounts) post is 25th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Office Secretary (Accounts) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Com or B.A degree along with a minimum of 2 years of work experience in computer operations, accounts, Tally, MS Word, or MS Office.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Office Secretary (Accounts) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Office Secretary (Accounts) post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 17,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by DUWA.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the DUWA Office Secretary (Accounts) job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Office Secretary (Accounts) post is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the Delhi University Womens Association (DUWA) located?
faq.answer: The Delhi University Womens Association (DUWA) is located in Delhi, with a pincode of 110007.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any age relaxations provided for SC/ST or OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify age limits or relaxation details. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification for any such information.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates as per the instructions in the notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies for the Office Secretary (Accounts) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Office Secretary (Accounts) in the Delhi University Womens Association (DUWA) recruitment.
